feedback.text: Censorship from credit card companies such as MasterCard or Visa has to be stopped. In no way should those companies decide, which content we are allowed to consume. As well as their censorship from critic in live chats. These companies have a stronghold as the income source for most others and therefore there is no real way to fight back as the one being censored. This act should put regulations on credit card companies since they have way too much control over what someone is able to purchase.
